# CWE-1125 negative: minimal authenticated surface (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1125-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1125 mitigated: only health and authenticated profile routes are registered.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func authRequiredPure(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if r.Header.Get("Authorization") == "" {
			http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
			return
		}
		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
	})
}

func MountMinimalSurfacePure(db *sql.DB) *http.ServeMux {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/health", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})
	profile := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		userID := r.Header.Get("X-User-ID")
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"user_id":"` + userID + `"}`))
	})
	mux.Handle("/api/profile", authRequiredPure(profile))
	_ = db
	return mux
}
